# Tech Debt Remediation PR

## Related Issue
Closes #<issue-number>

## Summary
Describe what tech debt is being addressed and why.

## Changes
- List key changes
- Note any refactoring or cleanup

## Risk Assessment
- Potential side effects
- Testing performed

## Checklist
- [ ] Linked to a tech debt issue
- [ ] Tests updated or added
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
